prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-CONSTRUCTION-KPL-PARENT Product Type: TOY_FIGURE_PLAYSET Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio Assorted Truck Toys with Action Figures Lights Sounds Playset, Ages 3 and Up (3 Styles) Description: Does your little one love trucks? Well, you’re in the right place! Kidplokio’s truck toy carrier playsets come in three themes: Construction, Dinosaur and Fire Truck. Whether it’s a firefighting mission, a construction site building adventure, or prehistoric playtime as a paleontologist, these awesome truck toys for boys are super fun!

Boasting lights, sounds and theme related action figures and accessories, kids will love creating their own pretend play adventures! All the themed truck toys feature lights and with the push of a few buttons, play sounds for the ultimate pretend play experience. Play pretend encourages creativity and imagination, while the tactile playtime experience helps children develop their fine motor skills and dexterity, while moving the action figures and vehicles around their play area. Hello screen free playtime!

Designed for at home or on the go play, these construction, dinosaur or fire truck toy playsets come with a convenient top carry handle, so little ones can bring their toys along with them on play dates, sleepovers, road trips, appointments and more. The truck toy carrier is easy to tote and travel with, as the sides snap closed, keeping action figures and accessories safety stowed.

All of the toys and accessories included with these toy truck playsets are safe for children ages three and up with adult supervision. And, made from durable materials, these toy trucks are designed to withstand all the action. For little guys who love construction, dinosaurs or fire trucks, this a must have gift from Kidplokio! Collect them all! Search Terms: construction dinosaur toddler toys; fire truck; toys for 3 year old boys; pretend play; stem toddler toys; tactile sensory toys; birthday gifts; toy truck; gifts for 3 year old boys; toddler playset; hand tools; hand eye coordination training Features: - TOY TRUCKS: Available in dinosaur, construction tools or firefighting themes, Kidplokio’s truck toy carriers come with bright lights, cool sounds and fun hand tools and accessories; these toy trucks also feature built in handles so playtime adventures can be taken to go for play dates, appointments or travel - LIGHTS AND SOUNDS: Bright lights and fun sounds are built into all the toy trucks for the ultimate playtime experience, making it more fun and realistic come playtime with friends and family, inspiring imagination and creativity - SCREEN FREE PLAYTIME: Sparking curiosity and developing dexterity and hand eye coordination, little one’s will benefit from creative pretend play while they participate in tactile, screen free playtime - DURABLE AND SAFE: All truck toys and accompanying accessories are safe for children ages 3 and up with adult supervision; Constructed of durable plastic that is easy to clean by wiping down and letting toys air dry - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 15 x 6 x 9 inches; Weight: 2.15lbs; Materials: Plastic; Warning: Choking Hazard, Small Parts; For Ages 3 and Up; Batteries Included === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Kidplokio Truck Toys with Action Figures Lights Sounds

tokens.name: Truck Toys with Action Figures Lights Sounds

anthropic.title_differentiation: 3 Themes - Construction, Dinosaur, Fire Truck, Lights And Sounds, Screen Free Play, Ages 3 And Up, Portable Carry Handle

openai.title_differentiation: Lights And Sounds, Carry Handle, Construction Figures And Accessories, Screen Free Pretend Play, Ages 3 And Up
